title: agriphyllum fruticosum
intro: Agriphyllum fruticosum, also known as Fructuous False Goldenglow, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and shrub-like growth habit. Traditionally, Agriphyllum fruticosum has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant properties. Agriphyllum fruticosum is often prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
